activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Calderys Nordic AB
Forshammarsgatan 2
SE- 662 32, ÅMÅL
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Calderys Nordic AB
Address: Box 216, SE-263 23 Höganäs
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Calderys Nordic AB' from Sweden in certificate matches invoice issuer 'Calderys Nordic AB' including VAT number; address differs in street vs box but this is acceptable. Company name and country match with allowed normalization. Rule 4.1.0 confirmed consignor name in invoice text. Rule 4.1.3.6 permits differences in legal form or address details. Rule 4.1.4 confirms country 'Sweden' matches.

consignee.certificate_value:
CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED
SURVEY NO.77/1 VILLAGE:DAHISAR-MORI
SHEELPARA-PANVEL ROAD
DIST.THANE, MAHARASHTRA
India
consignee.invoice_value:
CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED
(FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)
SURVEY NO.77/1,VILLAGE:DAHISAR-MORI
SHEELPARA - PANVEL ROAD,
0 DIST. THANE, MAHRASH
INDIA
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED' with detailed address in India in the certificate matches consignee and delivery address details in invoice. Address formatting differs slightly but is accepted under normalization rules. Country 'India' matches exactly. No contradictions found.

goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate 'CALDERYS INDIA Svenska Mix 5 A60 0,6' matches invoice description 'SVENSKA™ MIX 5 A60 0.6' ignoring minor punctuation and trademark symbol under allowed normalization. General goods description is accepted together with exact invoice reference and date as per rule 4.3.5.

quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity net weight 100,800 kg matches invoice quantity 100,800 TO (tons). Although units differ, this is acceptable since quantity is identified in both documents. Certificate uses NW (net weight), invoice shows unit 'TO' (tons) indicating the same quantity. Minor unit difference does not lead to mismatch. Quantity values align considering allowed normalizations.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin country 'Sweden' explicitly appears as 'MADE IN SWEDEN' in invoice, fulfilling positive identification with allowed normalization and EU-origin normalization active.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points - consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin - match between certificate and invoice with no contradictions.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Consignor, consignee, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan verifieras exakt. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
